Pricing & Lead Time

Set your net prices. These are what Yardstake pays you directly — never shown to the buyer.

Net-price protected: Buyers see a Yardstake retail price. Your net price is confidential between you and Yardstake.

Your model goes to Yardstake for review before going live in the Magic Map.

What Happens Next

Submitted for Review

Yardstake reviews your model specs and net pricing within 2 business days.

Approved & Live

Model appears in the Magic Map and starts attracting buyer traffic.

Model Submitted!

Your model is now in Yardstake's review queue. You'll receive an email and SMS once it's approved and live in the Magic Map.
